title: lastrea falciculata
intro: Lastrea falciculata, also known as the forked lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea falciculata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
